case_title: QUINN, JULIA FAYE VS IN-HOME SUPPORT SERVICES CONSORTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY QUINN, JULIA FAYE AS TO DEFENDANT IN-HOME SUPPORT SERVICES CONSORTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED-GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH PARTIES RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-12-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IN-HOME SUPPORT SERVICES CONSORTION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2007 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINN, JULIA FAYE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IN-HOME SUPPORT SERVICES CONSORTION THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYEES WERE RESPONSIBLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
